sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: European gasoline crack spreads recorded the largest weekly increase in history, with refining margins showing significant recovery. BP PLC (BP.US) rose more than 1.5%.
feed.summary: European gasoline crack spreads have seen an unprecedented weekly increase, signaling a significant recovery in refining margins. This positive development in the oil market is reflected in the more than 1.5% rise in BP PLC's stock (BP.US).

feed.title: FIS, Barclays extend core banking tie
feed.summary: FIS and Barclays have extended their core banking technology contract, which began in 2012. As part of this extension, FIS will continue providing its services and integrate a new solution, "Profile," designed to help Barclays manage deposits, accounts, and balances with real-time and multi-currency processing. This move supports Barclays' retail deposit growth ambitions and aligns with FIS's strategy to focus on large banks with significant assets.

feed.title: Judge rules Uber owes ‘non-delegable duty’ to passengers in sexual assault MDL
feed.summary: A federal judge has ruled that Uber has a "non-delegable duty" to ensure passenger safety, making them potentially liable for sexual assaults committed by its drivers. The ruling states that Uber, classified as a "common carrier," cannot avoid responsibility by labeling drivers as independent contractors. This decision is part of multidistrict litigation involving thousands of similar claims against Uber.

feed.title: Agnico bulking up in Finland with three acquisitions worth roughly $3.8-billion
feed.summary: Canadian gold miner Agnico Eagle Mines Ltd. is significantly expanding its presence in northern Finland with three acquisitions totaling approximately $3.8-billion. The company announced agreements to buy Rupert Resources Ltd. for up to $2.9-billion, Aurion Resources Ltd. for $481-million, and B2Gold Corp.’s stake in Fingold Ventures Ltd. for US$325-million. These moves will consolidate Agnico's operations in Lapland, where its Kittilä mine, one of Europe's largest gold operations, has been active since 2009.

feed.title: AT&T and Citi Enhance the AT&T Points Plus Card
feed.summary: AT&T and Citi have significantly enhanced the AT&T Points Plus Card, introducing new benefits including monthly discounts on AT&T wireless and internet bills, 2x ThankYou Points on AT&T products and services, and no foreign transaction fees. The card also continues to offer rewards on everyday spending like groceries and gas, with up to $240 in annual statement credits, all with no annual fee. These improvements aim to provide greater value, simplicity, and savings for AT&T customers.

feed.title: BJ's Wholesale Club opens first Texas store, expands into 22nd state
feed.summary: BJ's Wholesale Club has opened its first Texas store, marking its expansion into the 22nd state. The Marlborough-based company plans to open three more Dallas-area locations in the coming weeks. This expansion is part of a larger strategy to add 25 to 30 new locations across 2025 and 2026.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher: Great Business Still Trading At A Risky Price Before Earnings (NYSE:TMO)
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) is a high-quality business but is currently overvalued given its growth outlook. With FY25 revenue growth of 3.9% and EPS growth of 7.3%, and a FY26 adjusted EPS growth guidance of 6-8%, the stock's near 30x earnings/free cash flow valuation seems stretched without a return to double-digit growth. The author maintains a Hold rating, citing fair-to-rich valuation and potential risks like funding pressures and macroeconomic instability.

feed.title: Here's How Much $100 Invested In Thermo Fisher Scientific 20 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
feed.summary: Investing $100 in Thermo Fisher Scientific (NYSE: TMO) 20 years ago would yield $1,368.27 today, demonstrating the power of compounded returns. Over two decades, TMO has outperformed the market with an average annual return of 13.91%. The company currently holds a market capitalization of $198.89 billion.

feed.title: UBS Lifts Price Target on Xcel Energy to $91 From $89, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for Xcel Energy (XEL) to $91 from $89, while reiterating a 'Buy' rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst actions, with Barclays also raising its price target on Xcel Energy to $91 from $82, maintaining an 'Overweight' rating, and Jefferies & Co adjusting their target to $99 from $94 with a 'Buy' rating earlier in the month. The news indicates continued positive sentiment from financial institutions regarding Xcel Energy's stock performance.

feed.title: JPMorgan (JPM) prices callable contingent‑interest notes linked to 3 ETFs
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has priced $450,000 of callable contingent interest notes due April 20, 2028, guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These notes offer a 9.70% annual contingent interest rate, payable only if all three linked ETFs meet a 60.00% interest barrier on review dates. Investors face principal risk, as repayment at maturity depends on the performance of the least performing ETF, and JPMorgan also retains the option for early redemption.

feed.title: UBS reiterates PPL stock rating on Rhode Island rate case progress
feed.summary: UBS has reiterated its Neutral rating and $41.00 price target for PPL Corp (NYSE:PPL) following developments in the company’s Rhode Island rate case. Despite the Rhode Island Division of Public Utility Staff recommending a lower return on equity than PPL's proposal, UBS views this recommendation as a workable start to the regulatory process. The utility company, which has maintained dividend payments for 56 consecutive years, is currently seen as overvalued according to InvestingPro analysis, though other analysts like Jefferies, Wolfe Research, BTIG, and BMO Capital have recently raised their price targets due to progress in other regulatory cases.

feed.title: Bridging Data Science and Marketing: Adobe and Databricks Launch Delta Sharing for Adobe Experience Platform and Agentic Marketing Workflows
feed.summary: Adobe and Databricks have partnered to launch Delta Sharing for Adobe Experience Platform (AEP) and agentic marketing workflows, aiming to close the gap between customer intelligence management and marketing execution. This collaboration allows for direct, zero-copy access to governed first-party data in Databricks, eliminating the need for data duplication and reducing latency. The integration also includes bidirectional AI orchestration between Databricks Genie and Adobe Marketing Agent, enabling real-time, personalized campaigns and continuous optimization.

feed.title: Selling pressure pushes Colgate-Palmolive stock lower in today's trading
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive stock fell 2.11% today, trading at $84.00, below key moving averages. Despite a recent dividend increase and strong operating margins, analysts remain divided on its short-term outlook, with some citing ongoing selling pressure and others highlighting long-term support and fundamentals. The stock exhibits mixed technical signals and struggles with volatility amid institutional investor reallocations.

feed.title: 3M Co. (MMM) 4900 contracts of April 24 weekly calls trade into quarter results
feed.summary: 4900 contracts of April 24 weekly call options for 3M Co. (MMM) are trading with an implied volatility of 65, significantly higher than its 52-week range. This activity is occurring ahead of the release of its quarterly results, expected before the bell on April 21. The call-put ratio stands at 3.9 calls to 1 put, indicating a strong bullish sentiment among options traders.

feed.title: BP plc stock (GB0007980591): Is its energy transition strategy strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: BP plc is evolving its business model by transitioning from traditional oil and gas to renewable and low-carbon energy solutions. The company aims to balance reliable dividends for investors with significant investments in renewables, while navigating the risks of a high-interest-rate environment. BP's strategy focuses on a diversified portfolio, capital discipline, and strategic initiatives to achieve net-zero emissions by 2050.

feed.title: Flat trading for Bank of Nova Scotia stock as price remains in C$104.80–C$105.90 range
feed.summary: Bank of Nova Scotia (BNS) is currently trading flat, exhibiting sustained bullish momentum despite entering an overbought zone. The bank recently withdrew its interim 2030 and 2050 net-zero financed emissions targets due to revised regulatory assumptions. Analysts expect BNS to continue its upward trend with a projected volatility range of C$104.80 to C$105.90 for the next five trading days.

feed.title: BHP begins review to rank unprofitable Australian coal mines
feed.summary: BHP and Mitsubishi Development Pty Ltd. are reviewing the financial health of their coal mines and assets in Queensland due to concerns over Australia’s royalty regime. The joint venture partners are ranking each mine based on costs and financial health, after the Queensland mines reportedly returned no profit to BHP in the last six months of 2025. BHP has previously stated that the royalties, particularly the tiered system implemented in 2022, have made their operations unprofitable and declared there would be "zero" new capital investment in the state's coal business.

feed.title: Starbucks Wins Round in Court Over Production of Prior Burn Accident Info
feed.summary: A Los Angeles Superior Court judge has temporarily denied a request from a woman, Sala Lily Shabdiz, for internal information from Starbucks regarding previous burn accidents. Shabdiz alleges she suffered serious burns from a spilled hot drink purchased at a Starbucks in University Park, but the judge ruled that she did not adequately attempt to resolve the issues through negotiation first. This ruling comes after a Los Angeles jury awarded a Postmates driver $50 million in a separate case involving burns from a spilled Starbucks drink.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy Inc. stock (US15189T1079): Is its Texas grid resilience the real test for investors now?
feed.summary: This article examines CenterPoint Energy Inc.'s business model, competitive landscape, risks, and analyst perspectives, particularly focusing on its role in the Texas energy grid. It highlights the company's strategy of investing in grid modernization and expansion to meet growing demand and combat extreme weather, positioning it as a defensive play for investors seeking stable returns. The report emphasizes the importance of grid resilience in Texas for CenterPoint's continued success and investor confidence.

feed.title: Bank of Montreal stock holds steady after TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. reduces position
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal (BMO) stock saw a modest gain of 0.31% despite TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. reducing its holdings by 2.5% in Q4. Technical indicators suggest that BMO is in a strong bullish trend but is currently overbought, leading analysts to predict a near-term consolidation between C$206.00 and C$211.00.

feed.title: TRV (NYSE: TRV) files Form 144 listing 6,414 vested shares; prior 16,712 sold
feed.summary: Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) has filed a Form 144 notice disclosing the impending sale of 6,414 shares of common stock stemming from restricted stock vesting on February 18, 2026. The filing also revealed a previous sale of 16,712 shares on January 23, 2026, which generated proceeds of $4,675,593.64. As of April 20, 2026, the company reported 212,644,693 shares outstanding.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines trims summer schedule amid high fuel prices
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines is reducing some flights this summer due to operational factors, which analysts attribute to surging fuel prices. The airline has made "select adjustments across a small number of routes" and will directly contact impacted customers. Other airlines like United are also pruning flights due to high oil prices, and the CEO of United Airlines stated they would focus on less popular flying times such as overnights, Tuesdays, Wednesdays, and Saturdays.

feed.title: BlackBerry stock hits 52-week high at $5.33 By Investing.com
feed.summary: BlackBerry (BB) stock reached a new 52-week high of $5.33, reflecting positive investor sentiment with a 53% 1-year return and 28% year-to-date gain. This performance follows strong fiscal Q4 2026 results, surpassing analyst expectations with adjusted EPS of $0.06 and revenue of $156 million. The company's QNX division and Secure Communications both saw significant year-over-year revenue growth.

feed.title: Alpha and Omega Semiconductor stock hits 52-week high at $35.77
feed.summary: Alpha and Omega Semiconductor (AOSL) stock reached a new 52-week high of $35.77, currently trading just below this peak, reflecting a 114.09% 1-year change. Despite this strong performance and market optimism, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock might be overvalued relative to its Fair Value. Recent company news includes a Q2 fiscal year 2026 earnings miss, the start of production at its new India facility for IPM5 intelligent power modules, and the launch of new MOSFETs for AI server power applications, highlighting ongoing innovation and expansion efforts.

feed.title: Globe Life stock hits all-time high, reaching 152.79 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Globe Life Inc.'s stock has reached an all-time high of $152.79, marking a 30.21% increase over the past year due to strong performance and investor confidence. Despite missing Q4 2025 earnings and revenue estimates, the company raised its quarterly dividend and expanded its board of directors. Analysts view the stock as undervalued, with Texas Capital Securities initiating coverage with a buy rating and a $170 price target.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics Inc stock hits all-time high at 208.68 USD
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics Inc. (STLD) stock has reached an all-time high of $208.68, trading just below its 52-week high, with a market capitalization of $30 billion and a 72% increase over the past year. This achievement reflects strong investor confidence despite recent Q1 2026 earnings guidance falling short of analyst expectations, attributing the shortfall to reduced profitability in the Steel Fabrication segment and potential lower steel mill shipments due to winter weather. Analysts from BofA Securities and Jefferies reiterated a Buy rating, while Morgan Stanley maintained an Equalweight rating.

feed.title: Avnet stock hits all-time high at 74.45 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Avnet Inc.'s stock reached an all-time high of $74.45, nearing its 52-week high, reflecting a 60.56% total return over the past year and 54.45% year-to-date. This surge follows strong Q2 fiscal year 2026 results, with EPS and revenue surpassing forecasts, and a subsequent upgrade to "buy" by Truist Securities. Despite a P/E ratio of 29.98, InvestingPro analysis suggests it might be overvalued relative to its Fair Value.

feed.title: Popular Inc stock reaches 52-week high at 149.57 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Popular Inc. (BPOP) stock hit a new 52-week high of $149.57, reflecting a 75.52% return over the past year and a 25.5% return in the last six months. This surge highlights investor confidence despite an InvestingPro analysis suggesting the stock may be overvalued relative to its Fair Value. The company recently declared monthly cash dividends on its preferred stock, received an upgrade to "Buy" from UBS with a raised price target of $160, and announced executive leadership changes.

feed.title: Blackstone Stock Eyes $140 as Recovery Gains Steam
feed.summary: Blackstone (BX) stock is forecast to hit $140.36, representing a 9.55% upside from its current price, with a "BUY" recommendation from 24/7 Wall St. despite a volatile year. The alternative asset management giant manages $1.27 trillion in assets under management (AUM) and has shown strong growth in Perpetual Capital, Credit and Insurance, and Infrastructure AUM, indicating a solid fundamental case for recovery. While Q4 2025 earnings showed mixed results with a GAAP EPS miss, robust Distributable EPS and significant inflows suggest underlying business strength, setting the stage for crucial April 23 earnings.

feed.title: Diet Coke Makes Its Runway Debut with 20th Century Studios’ The Devil Wears Prada 2
feed.summary: Diet Coke is partnering with 20th Century Studios for the highly anticipated sequel, The Devil Wears Prada 2, which will be released on May 1st. This collaboration will feature fan-focused experiences, special edition packaging, and a bespoke ad campaign, aiming to engage audiences globally and extend the film's cultural influence. The promotion includes chances to win a trip to New York City and other prizes, reflecting Diet Coke's long-standing connection to fashion and culture.

feed.title: Warren Buffett's Investment in American Express Stock Turned Into a 40-Bagger Success. Here's the Secret Behind It
feed.summary: Warren Buffett's investment in American Express (NYSE: AXP) has grown 40-fold, a success often attributed to brand strength and customer loyalty. However, the article highlights a quieter force: American Express's systematic increase of per-share earnings through consistent share buybacks. This strategy allowed Berkshire Hathaway to more than double its ownership of American Express's profits without deploying additional capital, even as its investment cost decreased.

feed.title: Bank of America Opens the Market
feed.summary: Bank of America celebrated its deep-rooted history in Canada, dating back to 1903, by opening the market alongside TMX Group representatives and Ontario's Minister of Finance. The bank has a significant presence in Canada with over 1,000 employees across multiple offices, providing comprehensive financial services to its Canadian clients.

feed.title: Bank of America Opens the Market
feed.summary: Bank of America, represented by Drew McDonald, President and Country Executive for Canada, along with Ontario's Minister of Finance, Peter Bethlenfalvy, opened the market to celebrate the bank's long-standing history in Canada dating back to 1903. Bank of America has a significant presence in Canada with over 1,000 employees across multiple offices, offering comprehensive financial services to its Canadian clients.

feed.title: McDonald's Corp stock (US5801351017): Is franchise efficiency now the real growth lever?
feed.summary: This article analyzes McDonald's Corp's business model, emphasizing its reliance on a franchise system for consistent margins despite evolving consumer habits and rising costs. It explores how the company's capital-light structure, focused on royalties and real estate, enables scalability and steady cash flows, positioning it as a resilient investment in the fast-food industry. The piece also highlights strategic initiatives like digital acceleration, menu innovation, and sustainability efforts aimed at driving future growth and maintaining its competitive edge.

feed.title: Evercore adds Arista Networks, IBM to tactical outperform list ahead of earnings
feed.summary: Evercore ISI analyst Amit Daryanani has included Arista Networks and IBM on the firm's tactical outperform list, anticipating "beat-and-raise" scenarios for both companies ahead of their upcoming first-quarter earnings reports. Daryanani expects IBM to deliver moderate upside against revenue and EPS estimates, driven by an attractive setup, while Arista Networks is projected to surpass consensus estimates due to strong AI demand and enterprise momentum. The analyst also forecasts Arista to guide Q2 revenue above consensus and potentially raise its full-year target, citing incremental wins at Anthropic and Google, alongside the launch of XPO as a potential accelerant.

feed.title: Bitmine Buys 101,627 ETH As BMNR Tests Breakout Near $23
feed.summary: Bitmine Immersion (NYSE: BMNR) has purchased 101,627 Ethereum (ETH) in the past week, bringing its total holdings to 4.976 million ETH, valued at $11.45 billion. This acquisition marks the highest weekly buying pace for the company since December 2025, and coincides with BMNR's stock testing a channel breakout near $23. The company now owns 4.12% of Ethereum's total supply and is approaching its goal of 5%, with Chairman Tom Lee noting positive signs that the "mini-crypto" winter is ending.

feed.title: Kroger’s fueling empire grows as competitors threaten
feed.summary: Kroger has built a significant fueling operation with over 1,700 fuel centers, using them to drive loyalty and offer fuel discounts through its rewards programs. However, major competitors like Walmart and Costco are rapidly expanding their own fuel businesses, posing a growing threat to Kroger's market position. These rival retailers also leverage fuel sales to enhance their membership benefits and attract customers.

feed.title: L3Harris: Strong Results Coming, But A Weak Stock For The Near Term (NYSE:LHX)
feed.summary: L3Harris is expected to report strong Q1 results, likely surpassing Street estimates due to increased defense spending. Despite this operational strength and recent outperformance driven by geopolitical tensions, the stock trades at a high multiple of ~27x earnings. The author anticipates a near-term downside risk, suggesting $300 as a better entry point, as the appetite for high-multiple defense stocks may wane if geopolitical tensions subside.

feed.title: Arvinas unveils preclinical findings for HPK1 and pan-KRAS PROTAC candidates
feed.summary: Arvinas is presenting preclinical data for its HPK1 degrader and pan-KRAS degrader PROTAC candidates at the AACR Annual Meeting. These early-stage oncology innovations aim to disrupt critical signaling pathways for cancer treatment. The company seeks to highlight advancements in targeted protein degradation therapies through these findings.

feed.title: APO Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Apollo Global Management, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm is reminding investors of a class action lawsuit against Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE: APO) for securities fraud. The lawsuit alleges that Apollo made false statements regarding its dealings with Jeffrey Epstein, potentially harming the company's reputation and causing investor damages. Investors who purchased Apollo securities between May 10, 2021, and February 21, 2026, are encouraged to contact the firm before May 1, 2026, to discuss their rights.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley raises Intel target but prefers these chip stocks more By Investing.com
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley increased its price target for Intel to $56 from $41 due to expected higher server demand and earnings, projecting about 30% year-over-year revenue growth for Intel’s data center segment in 2026. However, the firm maintains an "Equal-weight" rating on Intel due to concerns about its server product roadmap and foundry ambitions, instead preferring memory chipmakers Micron and SanDisk for investors seeking to capitalize on AI-driven processor demand, citing better risk-reward and tight data center supply.

feed.title: Warren Buffett's Investment in American Express Stock Turned Into a 40-Bagger Success. Here's the Secret Behind It
feed.summary: Warren Buffett's 40-bagger success with American Express stock is attributed not just to business growth, but significantly to per-share earnings growth driven by consistent share buybacks. These buybacks allowed Berkshire Hathaway to increase its ownership percentage and collect rising dividends without additional capital deployment, effectively amplifying Buffett's returns. The article highlights the importance of investing in profitable companies that strategically repurchase their shares for long-term growth.

feed.title: Lululemon Athletica Inc. Expands Store Footprint in Mexico
feed.summary: Lululemon Athletica Inc. is set to significantly expand its presence in Mexico during fiscal year 2026, planning to open eight new stores in the country as part of a larger North American expansion of 15 stores. This will bring their total store count in Mexico to over 30. The company has been actively building its brand and community connections in Mexico, including a 10K race in Mexico City and a summit for local Ambassadors, reinforcing its strategy for growth in the market.

feed.title: Coca-Cola HBC Executives Lift Holdings Through Employee Share Plan
feed.summary: Coca-Cola HBC executives, including CEO Zoran Bogdanovic, have increased their shareholdings through the company's Employee Share Purchase Plan, which includes matching contributions from the company. These transactions, executed on April 17, 2026, on the London Stock Exchange, are aimed at reinforcing equity-based incentives for senior management. Despite the relatively small volume, the activity underscores the company's continuous use of share ownership schemes for key management retention and motivation.

feed.title: Honeywell Sold a Business. It’s a Bigger Deal for This Company.
feed.summary: Honeywell has sold one of its businesses, a move that is part of its ongoing portfolio adjustments. While this is a continuation of Honeywell's long-term strategy, the acquisition is described as transformational for the purchasing company, although the buyer is not named in this excerpt. Honeywell's stock was up 20% year-to-date ahead of Monday trading.

feed.title: Cintas Corp. stock (US1729081035): Why does its uniform rental dominance matter more now for steady growth?
feed.summary: Cintas Corp. stands out for its resilient business model focused on uniform rental and facility services, providing predictable revenue through long-term rental contracts. The company's expansion into safety and facility services further diversifies its offerings, tapping into growing regulatory and hygiene demands. Cintas's strong competitive advantages, including its national footprint and proprietary technology, position it as a stable investment amid market uncertainties.

feed.title: Will Strong Q1 Results, NFL Deal and Amazon Card Push Change U.S. Bancorp's (USB) Narrative
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp reported strong Q1 2026 results with increased net interest income and net income, alongside significant share repurchases. The company also announced a multi-year partnership with the NFL and is expanding its small-business credit card offerings through Amazon, which could positively impact its investment narrative and national presence. Despite these positive developments, investors should remain aware of existing risks like credit quality concerns in commercial real estate.

feed.title: Phillips 66, United Airlines, DSV Enter 42MM-Liter SAF Partnership
feed.summary: Phillips 66, United Airlines, DSV, and Microsoft have partnered to supply 41.6 million liters of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF), which is expected to avoid 100,000 metric tons of lifecycle greenhouse gas emissions. United Airlines will use the fuel, while DSV and Microsoft participate through a book-and-claim methodology, allowing verified emissions reductions to be allocated independently. Phillips 66, with its integrated assets and operational experience, aims to meet the demand for lower-carbon aviation fuels.

feed.title: BMO Capital raises Travelers stock price target on earnings outlook
feed.summary: BMO Capital Markets increased its price target for Travelers Companies Inc. (NYSE:TRV) to $314 from $297, while maintaining an Outperform rating. The firm anticipates Travelers' earnings per share to surpass consensus estimates in the coming one to two years, driven by more conservative reserve loss-ratio profit margin assumptions. This update follows Travelers' strong Q1 2026 financial results, which exceeded both earnings and revenue expectations.

feed.title: Free EV charging for 2 hours marks Blink’s 600kW Colorado site
feed.summary: Blink Charging is partnering with VASA Fitness and Kempower to offer two hours of free EV charging on Earth Day (April 22, 2026) at their new 600kW DC fast charging site in Lafayette, Colorado. The site features CCS and NACS connectors and up to 360 kW peak per stall. Additionally, drivers can receive a $5 charging credit by submitting a PlugShare review between April 22-29.
